  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

4RD X91 V4.3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 753
Recv ID: 773
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 23
Func Name: 4WS

    "minbytes": 3,
    "shiftbytescount": 4,
    "replybytes": "59020000000000",
    "sentbytes": "1902FF",

    "deny_sds": [],

      "StatusOfDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedThisMonitoringCycle": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "DTCStatus.pendingDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "DTCStatus.confirmedDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedThisMonitoringCycle": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "DTCStatus.warningIndicatorRequested": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCFailureType.Category": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "DTCFailureType": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "DTCDeviceIdentifier": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "DTCDeviceAndFailureTypeOBD": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "DTCFailureType.ManufacturerOrSupplier": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatusAvailabilityMask": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },

      "RoutineEntryStatus": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "3E01",
    "name": "TesterPresent.WithResponse",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "sentbytes": "310101",
    "name": "StatusRoutine - OscillationOfActuator",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "RoutineEntryStatus": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "30010100",
    "name": "Output Control",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Output Control Command": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Lamp Activation Request.Value": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Rear Wheel Angle Position Request.Value": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Output Temporary Control List": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Output Permanent Control List": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Output Control Status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "310300",
    "name": "StartRoutine - ECU Init Phase",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "RoutineEntryOption": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "RoutineEntryStatus_ECUInitPhase": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "2180",
    "name": "DataRead.Identification.5digits",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "CalibrationNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "DiagnosticIdentificationCode": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "SoftwareNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "SupplierNumber.ITG": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "EditionNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "ApprovalNumber.BasicPartList": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true
      },
      "PartNumber.LowerPart": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "HardwareNumber.LowerPart": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ManufacturerIdentificationCode": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SupplierNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "PartNumber.BasicPartList": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "HardwareNumber.BasicPartList": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "21F0",
    "name": "DataRead.LogZone.5digits",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "CalibrationNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "SoftwareNumber": {

        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "firstbyte": 9,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "EditionNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "endian": "Little"

      "ApprovalNumber.BasicPartList": {
        "firstbyte": 25

        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "HardwareNumber.LowerPart": {
        "firstbyte": 12
      },

        "firstbyte": 26
      },
      "SupplierNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 9

        "firstbyte": 23,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "firstbyte": 24,
        "endian": "Little"
      }
    }

    "minbytes": 3,
    "sentbytes": "300101",
    "name": "IO Control RWAPostionRequest Status",

    }

    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "1085",

    "deny_sds": [],

    }
  },

    "minbytes": 2,

    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "30010000",
    "name": "IO Control RWAPostionRequest Start",
    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 703,
    "sentbytes": "2121",
    "name": "RDBLId - DataRecorder",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds",
      "plant",
      "aftersales"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "DataRecorder Data": {

        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC1_PC1_RWAPosition": {

        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC1_PC1_VehicleSpeed": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC1_PC2_DistanceTotalizer": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC1_PC1_OccurrenceCounter": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC1_PC2_ECU_Temperature": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC1_PC2_RWAPosition": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC1_PC1_DistanceTotalizer": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC1_PC2_OccurrenceCounter": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC2_BatteryVoltage": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC2_DistanceTotalizer": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC2_OccurrenceCounter": {
        "firstbyte": 30,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC3_SWA": {
        "firstbyte": 34,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC3_FailureLampState": {
        "firstbyte": 36,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC3_BatteryVoltage": {
        "firstbyte": 37,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC3_DistanceTotalizer": {
        "firstbyte": 38,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC3_OccurrenceCounter": {
        "firstbyte": 42,
        "ref": true
      },
      "DR_VC3_DurationOfTheEvent": {
        "firstbyte": 46,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "21F0",
    "name": "RDBLID - LogZone - HWNumber",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds"
    ],

        "ref": true

    }
  }
